description: Installs PHP and/or phpMyAdmin via Chocolatey. Supports 3 modes.

messages.notAdmin: This script must be run as Administrator.
messages.scriptDisabled: PHP installation is disabled in config.
messages.phpDisabled: PHP is disabled in config -- skipping.
messages.phpNotFound: PHP not found -- installing via Chocolatey...
messages.phpNotInPath: PHP installed but not found in PATH -- restart your terminal.
messages.pmaNotFound: phpMyAdmin not found -- installing via Chocolatey...
messages.completedWithWarnings: Completed with some warnings -- check output above.
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.

commands.uninstall: Uninstall completely, remove tracking, clean up
